scripts.dev: concurrently -n "frontend,backend,admin" -c "cyan,green,magenta" "yarn workspace frontend dev" "yarn workspace noble-cert-backend dev" "yarn workspace admin-frontend dev"
scripts.lint: concurrently -n "frontend,backend,admin" -c "cyan,green,magenta" "yarn workspace frontend lint" "yarn workspace noble-cert-backend run tsc --noEmit" "yarn workspace admin-frontend lint"
scripts.build: concurrently -n "frontend,backend,admin" -c "cyan,green,magenta" "yarn workspace frontend build" "yarn workspace noble-cert-backend build" "yarn workspace admin-frontend build"
